# flashduty_team (Data Source)

Use this data source to get information about a Flashduty team.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get team by ID
data "flashduty_team" "by_id" {
  team_id = 12345
}

# Get team by name
data "flashduty_team" "by_name" {
  team_name = "SRE Team"
}

# Get team by external reference ID
data "flashduty_team" "by_ref" {
  ref_id = "sre-team-ref"
}

output "team_name" {
  value = data.flashduty_team.by_id.team_name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `ref_id` (String) The external reference ID of the team.
- `team_id` (Number) The ID of the team. One of `team_id`, `team_name`, or `ref_id` must be specified.
- `team_name` (String) The name of the team.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (Number) The creation timestamp.
- `description` (String) The description of the team.
- `updated_at` (Number) The last update timestamp.
